summary.intent: Build a polished Electron app UI using Mantine as the component library, with a GitHub-style dark/light theme, improved sessions table with copy-to-clipboard and activity indicators, and a chat-transcript-style session detail view.
summary.outcome: Fully migrated the app to Mantine, implemented theme-aware dark/light mode throughout all screens and components, redesigned the sessions table with truncation/copy/activity dots, and rebuilt the session detail as a chat transcript with nested tool uses, GitHub avatars, and the Claude Code logo.

repo: Project is at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer — Electron app under app/, server under src/, Prisma schema at prisma/schema.prisma
Renderer source is at app/src/renderer/src/ with screens/, components/, assets/ subdirectories
CheckpointSessionMetadata.createdAt (nullable) is the source for checkpoint creation timestamps — CheckpointMetadata has no createdAt
Activity status thresholds: <2min=green (active), <15min=orange (idle), else gray (inactive), based on session.updatedAt
Breadcrumbs are propagated via React context (BreadcrumbContext) set by child screens, consumed by Layout

code.finding: CopyCell component wraps Table.Td with hover-triggered absolute ActionIcon for clipboard copy; activityDot helper derives status color/label from updatedAt
groupClaudeTurns() merges consecutive tool groups + Stop events into claudeTurn units; ClaudeTurnCard renders message + collapsible tool uses in one card
All code block and prose colors were hardcoded light values — needed light-dark() replacements throughout
AppShell.Header must span full viewport width for hamburger to remain visible when navbar is collapsed; burger must NOT be inside AppShell.Main
TypeScript declaration file needed for .png imports in renderer
Must use .cjs extension (not .js) for PostCSS config in this Vite/Electron setup; requires postcss-preset-mantine and postcss-simple-vars with breakpoint variables

workflow: Mantine's X-0 color variants (e.g. teal-0, gray-0, blue-0) are always the lightest shade regardless of color scheme — they are NOT theme-aware and must be wrapped in light-dark()
light-dark(lightValue, darkValue) CSS function works in Electron/Chromium and reads color-scheme from <html> set by MantineProvider
localStorageColorSchemeManager persists color scheme preference across Electron app restarts
Claude Code app icon can be extracted from /Applications/Claude.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns using iconutil -c iconset
Mantine v7 AppShell collapsed prop syntax: collapsed: { desktop: !open, mobile: !open }

friction: Dark mode fix required multiple rounds — first the sidebar background, then the hamburger button visibility, then SessionDetail, then MarkdownView code blocks — hardcoded light colors were scattered across many files
AppShell hamburger placement caused two iterations: first placed inside Main (hidden when sidebar closed), then correctly moved to Header
useLocation state destructuring left unused after refactor — caused potential lint noise
Finding the correct Claude Code coloured icon required multiple attempts: tray icon was monochrome, needed iconutil to extract from .icns
open_items: CheckpointDetail.tsx and SessionTree.tsx were originally migrated to Mantine but not audited for dark mode hardcoded colors (teal-0, gray-0 variants)
CheckpointMessageItem.tsx was identified as having light-mode-only colors (indigo-0, #fff, orange border) but no fix was shown in the transcript
Breadcrumbs on non-session screens (Checkpoints, CheckpointTimeline, CheckpointDetail, SessionTree) are not set — header shows nothing on those pages
The sessions table breadcrumb uses the first session's user/repo — if sessions span multiple users/repos this may be incorrect
ToolUseItem.tsx diff view (red-0/green-0) was patched but not verified in the final build shown
